scripts.start:mock: env USE_MOCK_LEADERBOARD=1 PAYOUT_PLACES_HEURISTIC=45 node --import tsx server/src/index.ts
scripts.dev:mock: env USE_MOCK_LEADERBOARD=1 PAYOUT_PLACES_HEURISTIC=45 tsx watch server/src/index.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test server/src/lib/payoutProbability.test.ts server/src/lib/payoutCalibration.test.ts server/src/lib/payoutCalibrationFit.test.ts server/src/lib/fishEntryKeyUtils.test.ts server/src/lib/weighStationNormalize.test.ts server/src/lib/fishArrivals.test.ts server/src/lib/weatherOpenMeteo.test.ts server/src/lib/weatherStations.test.ts server/src/lib/weatherSnapshot.test.ts server/src/lib/waterTempAmeren.test.ts server/src/lib/anglerSearch.test.ts
